description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a slightly hunched posture. Its plumage features a blend of muted brown, gray, and reddish tones, with subtle mottling and gradient transitions along the wings and back. The head is small and rounded, with a short, straight beak that tapers to a point, and the eyes are set forward. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is long and pointed, with individual feathers visible at the tip. The legs are short and tucked beneath the body, with a pale, grayish coloration. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and quick flight, commonly seen in urban parks and green spaces.
description: A medium-sized bird with brown, gray, and reddish mottled plumage, a pointed tail, and a short, straight beak. Its body is streamlined and lifelike, with subtle feather details and muted coloring.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, mottled brown and gray plumage, and pointed tail feathers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow, pointed tail and the symmetrical arrangement of the folded wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined body and feather pattern, with the beak and head profile visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the subtle reddish coloring on the chest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled and gradient with subtle spots and bars on wings and back
